title: Governed artifact node
description: The governed work product. Carried in an artifact.created event under payload.node. TOLERANT v0 draft: additionalProperties is permissive; only the classification and status enums are locked (PRD 10.1).

id.description: Node ID; embeds the artifact ID, e.g. artifact:association-board-brief-001. Embedding rule documented in provenance/graph-model.md; enforced by ids.py in Phase 2, not regex-enforced here.

owner.description: Accountable human. SHOULD be a typed actor ID (human:...); not pattern-enforced in v0.1 to keep the loose phase tolerant.
